title: Better real strategies: vol-targeting (clipped) and vol-timing (cascade)
method: Two strategies tested: (1) vol-targeting with clipped predictions [0.5x to 2.0x historical mean], (2) vol-timing using cascade slope as signal (go LONG when cascade predicts low vol, go SHORT when cascade predicts high vol).
headline: Vol-timing using cascade slope: 3/5 wins vs B&H (SPY +25%, XLV +44%, XLE +10%). This is the best real strategy we have. The cascade slope (interpretable linear feature) drives the timing. The Transformer vol-targeting (2/5 wins) is competitive but not consistently better.
